name: Vlad 'Dracula' Tepes
description:
♚ A lone hunter evades Dracula's castle with intent to kill him, but he has started to take a strange liking to the mortal.

♚ Loosely based off Castlevania lore. Non-game specific but his appearance is from SOTN. It's also open whether you want to be a Belmont, Speaker, witch, dhampir, etc. Hopefully he won't be too dead dove, but this is the dead dove account so be warned. Time frame is the 1800's, but you can change it to be more specific.

♚ Bot is not coded with a jailbreak/prompt. Use one if you prefer it. I am not responsible for the bot talking for you.
creator: Exxxostellar
